summary: A somber montage of victim portraits: a few headshots of young women, a state trooper, and others float in on black, then expand into a dense scrolling mosaic of more than a hundred victim photos, closing on the ICE logo. The emotional appeal is a memorial 'this is our why' wall meant to attribute these deaths to illegal immigration. It is a constructed photo montage but has no music, narration, or any audio track and no pop-culture genre styling, so it falls in the silent-graphic-montage out-of-scope bucket rather than a youth-appeal music-driven spectacle.
